days.title: Arrival in Paris
days.subtitle: Discovering the City of Lights

timeline.title: Depart from London St Pancras
timeline.detail: Board the Eurostar train to Paris. The train journey takes around 2 hours and 15 minutes, so be sure to arrive early for check-in.
timeline.mapQuery: London St Pancras International, London, UK

timeline.title: Arrive at Gare du Nord
timeline.detail: You arrive in Paris at Gare du Nord. Follow signs to the Metro for transport or take a taxi for convenient access to your hotel.

timeline.title: Check in to Hôtel des Grands Boulevards
timeline.detail: Settle in at this stylish hotel located a short walk from the Metro. Take a moment to relax and freshen up after your journey.
timeline.mapQuery: Hôtel des Grands Boulevards, Paris, France

timeline.title: Lunch at Le Bouillon Pigalle
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional French lunch in this lively bistro. Be sure to try the classic onion soup and steak frites, both local favorites.

timeline.title: Visit the Louvre Museum
timeline.detail: Explore the world-renowned art collection at the Louvre. Don’t miss the Mona Lisa and the stunning glass pyramid entrance.
timeline.mapQuery: Louvre Museum, Rue de Rivoli, Paris, France

timeline.title: Stroll through the Jardin des Tuileries
timeline.detail: Take a leisurely walk through the beautiful Tuileries Garden, enjoying the lovely landscaping and sculptures. A perfect spot to unwind.

timeline.title: Dinner at Le Train Bleu
timeline.detail: Savor dinner at this iconic restaurant known for its elegant decor and classic French cuisine. The duck confit and soufflés are highly recommended.
timeline.mapQuery: Le Train Bleu, Gare de Lyon, Paris, France

localTips: Buy a Paris Visite pass for unlimited travel on public transportation within the city.
Book Louvre tickets online to skip the long queues.
At restaurants, tipping is appreciated but not mandatory; rounding up the bill is common.
Try to learn a few basic French phrases; locals appreciate the effort.
Make dining reservations in advance to ensure you get a table at popular spots.

days.title: Exploring More of Paris
days.subtitle: Art, Culture, and Cuisine

timeline.title: Breakfast at Café de Flore
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional French breakfast of croissants and café au lait at this historic café known for its literary patrons.

timeline.title: Visit Sacré-Cœur Basilica
timeline.detail: Climb the steps to the iconic Sacré-Cœur Basilica for stunning panoramic views of Paris. Don't forget to explore the beautiful interior.

timeline.title: Explore Montmartre
timeline.detail: Wander through the charming streets of Montmartre, known for its artistic history and bohemian atmosphere. Stop by Place du Tertre to see artists at work.

timeline.title: Lunch at Chez Janou
timeline.detail: Dine at this delightful Provençal restaurant, known for its cozy atmosphere and exquisite dishes like ratatouille and fresh seafood.

timeline.title: Visit Musée d'Orsay
timeline.detail: Admire the vast collection of Impressionist and Post-Impressionist masterpieces housed in this former railway station. A must-see for art lovers.

timeline.title: Evening Seine River Cruise
timeline.detail: Enjoy a scenic Seine River cruise and see famous landmarks like Notre-Dame and the Eiffel Tower illuminated at night. A truly magical experience.

timeline.title: Dinner at Les Ombres
timeline.detail: End your trip with a splendid dinner at this rooftop restaurant that offers breathtaking views of the Eiffel Tower while enjoying exquisite French cuisine.

localTips: Consider using the Metro to get around efficiently and affordably.
Always validate your Metro ticket before boarding.
Try to visit during off-peak hours to enjoy museums with fewer crowds.
Bring a portable charger for your phone – you’ll be taking many photos.
Check the weather forecast before planning outdoor activities.

hotels.name: Hôtel des Grands Boulevards
hotels.note: Stylish boutique hotel 10-min walk from Gare du Nord.

budget.item: Eurostar Train from London to Paris
budget.note: Round trip ticket booked in advance, best price.
Stylish hotel in central Paris, about €150 per night.
Approximate total for restaurant dining and snacks.

Evening cruise ticket for a unique view of Paris.
Paris Visite pass for 2 days of unlimited travel.
Unexpected costs such as souvenirs or small purchases.

urgent.label: Book Louvre Tickets
urgent.note: Pre-book online to skip the line & ensure entry.

urgent.label: Book Seine River Cruise
urgent.note: Reserve your spot in advance for the evening cruise.
